scope.notes: T10 implemented result, activation, activated page flows against the existing T07 API client methods. Runtime browser/API transcript evidence remains T13/T14 scope; final product PASS remains T16 scope.

evidence.summary: Verified result, activate, and activated routes render T10 flow components, no longer use placeholders, wire card/render/start/seal/save/share client methods, include required copy, guard already activated cards, and avoid forbidden paywall copy.
Verified 3000ms threshold, timer-backed completion, pointer cancellation paths, completed hold duration never below 3000ms, and cancel path does not invoke completion.
TypeScript completed with no emit and no errors after repairing timer typing.
ESLint completed with max-warnings=0 after removing an unused card-read variable.
Route smoke recognizes the new T10 route components while leaving T11 placeholders intact.

repairRecord.issue: Initial typecheck failed because the browser timer ref was typed as Node Timeout.
repairRecord.repair: Changed the hold timer ref to number | null and reran typecheck successfully.

repairRecord.issue: Initial lint failed on an unused card-read variable in ResultPageFlow.
repairRecord.repair: Removed the unused binding while preserving the guard read, then reran lint successfully.

rerunResumeState.notes: Use pnpm.cmd on this Windows PowerShell surface. T10 did not start a browser/server or capture API transcripts/screenshots; runtime click/API evidence remains T13/T14/T15.

exitCondition: T13 can execute result -> activate -> hold 3s seal -> activated browser clicks, and T11 can build share/saved pages from the T10 save/share/done CTAs.
